'''G2-3B''' was a spindly [[G2 repair droid/Legends|G2 repair droid]] who supervised the work being done by [[G2-9T/Legends|G2-9T]] and [[G2-4T]] for [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] in the aftermath of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CSWE" /> He did not have a conventional head for his droid model.<ref name="ST">[[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']]</ref>
